age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 40 years Age Relaxation: 10 years for existing employees of MPEDA, and as per Govt. of India rules for SC/ST/OBC/PWBD/Ex-Servicemen.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Computer Application (MCA) /M. Tech/ Computer Science or equivalent with 2 years' experience in Electronic Data Processing / Programming
qualification.details: Master's Degree in Computer Application (MCA) /M. Tech/ Computer Science or equivalent with 2 years' experience in Electronic Data Processing / Programming.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of MPEDA to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download MPEDA System Analyst Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MPEDA System Analyst recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the MPEDA System Analyst recruitment is 20th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the System Analyst post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree in Computer Application (MCA) / M. Tech / Computer Science or equivalent with 2 years of experience in Electronic Data Processing / Programming.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the System Analyst position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the System Analyst post is 40 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the System Analyst role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will be placed in Pay Matrix Level 10, with a salary ranging from ₹56,100 to ₹1,77,500 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the System Analyst post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of System Analyst in MPEDA.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for General and OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC candidates is ₹300.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for MPEDA System Analyst recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a common written test followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for MPEDA System Analyst recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article, under the "Official Notification PDF" link.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for SC/ST/OBC/PWBD/Ex-Servicemen as per Government of India rules, and 10 years for existing employees of MPEDA.

faq.question: Q10. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is strictly online.
